providers.name: Dr. James Park, DDS
providers.bio: Dr. Park has over 12 years of experience in general and cosmetic dentistry. He founded Bright Smile Dental with a focus on patient comfort, honest care, and beautiful natural results.

providers.name: Dr. Maya Patel, DDS
providers.bio: Dr. Patel specializes in veneers, whitening, and smile design. She brings a meticulous eye for aesthetics and a gentle chairside manner to every patient visit.

providers.name: Sarah Kim, RDH
providers.bio: Sarah has been with the practice since day one. She performs cleanings, periodontal care, and patient education with a focus on making every visit comfortable.

providers.name: Marcus Johnson
providers.bio: Marcus handles scheduling, insurance questions, and the flow of every visit. He is the first face you see and makes sure every patient feels welcome from arrival.
